'''zhayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:abackward|abackward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:abackward|abackward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhayate|zhayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhayatesher|zhayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhayatesherĂ«m|zhayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhayatero|zhayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhayateshĂ«|zhayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhayateshĂ«m|zhayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhayatero|gokizhayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhayateshĂ«|gokizhayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhayateshĂ«m|gokizhayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhayankerom|gozhayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhayankeshĂ«|gozhayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhayankeshĂ«m|gozhayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhayankeya|gozhayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhayaterom|zhayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhayatemu|zhayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhayateya|zhayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhayaterom|gokizhayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhayatemu|gokizhayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhayateya|gokizhayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhayayate|zhayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhayayatesher|zhayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhayayatesherĂ«m|zhayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhayayatero|zhayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhayayateshĂ«|zhayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhayayateshĂ«m|zhayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhayayatero|gokizhayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhayayateshĂ«|gokizhayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhayayateshĂ«m|gokizhayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhayayankerom|gozhayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhayayankeshĂ«|gozhayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhayayankeshĂ«m|gozhayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhayayankeya|gozhayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhayayaterom|zhayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhayayatemu|zhayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhayayateya|zhayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhayayaterom|gokizhayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhayayatemu|gokizhayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhayayateya|gokizhayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠyĂŠte|zhĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠyĂŠtesher|zhĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠyĂŠtero|zhĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠyĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠyĂŠterom|zhĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠyĂŠtemu|zhĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠyĂŠteya|zhĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠyĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠyĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafyafte|zhafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafyaftesher|zhafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafyaftesherĂ«m|zhafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafyaftero|zhafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafyafteshĂ«|zhafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafyafteshĂ«m|zhafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafyaftero|gokizhafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafyafteshĂ«|gokizhafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafyafteshĂ«m|gokizhafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafyafnkerom|gozhafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafyafnkeshĂ«|gozhafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafyafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafyafnkeya|gozhafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafyafterom|zhafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafyaftemu|zhafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafyafteya|zhafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafyafterom|gokizhafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafyaftemu|gokizhafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafyafteya|gokizhafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
